Columns.Name: 転圧_見積手配待ち件数
転圧_再調査結果待ち件数

ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql:
SELECT sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.design_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "転圧_設計待ち件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.estimate_arrange_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "転圧_見積手配待ち件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.estimate_arrange_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "転圧_見積手配中件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.wait_order_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "転圧_受注待ち件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.compaction_check_schedule_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "転圧_日程確認中件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.compaction_confirm_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "転圧_転圧確認中件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.wait_enforce_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "転圧_施工待ち件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.construction_examination_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "転圧_施工審査中件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.resurvey_result_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "転圧_再調査結果待ち件数",
    sum(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.compaction_complete_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) AS "転圧_完了待ち件数"
   FROM (t_object_compaction main
     JOIN m_compaction_status sub ON ((main.compaction_status_id = sub.compaction_status_id)))
  WHERE ((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM t_object_order
          WHERE ((t_object_order.object_order_id = main.object_order_id) AND (t_object_order.active_flg = 1)))) AND ((sub.design_wait_flg = 1) OR (sub.estimate_arrange_wait_flg = 1) OR (sub.estimate_arrange_flg = 1) OR (sub.wait_order_flg = 1) OR (sub.compaction_check_schedule_flg = 1) OR (sub.compaction_confirm_flg = 1) OR (sub.wait_enforce_flg = 1) OR (sub.construction_examination_flg = 1) OR (sub.resurvey_result_wait_flg = 1) OR (sub.compaction_complete_wait_flg = 1)));
